title: Rehearings
doc_html:
§1247.  Rehearings

A decision or order in a case of adjudication shall be subject to rehearing, reopening, or reconsideration by the board within ten days from the date of its entry.

Acts 1999, No. 767, §1.

§1247.  Rehearings
A decision or order in a case of adjudication shall be subject to rehearing, reopening, or reconsideration by the board within ten days from the date of its entry.
Acts 1999, No. 767, §1.
